description: Sync enterprise data from SAP HANA in-memory database to any Fivetran-supported destination. Supports incremental replication of SAP HANA tables.

fields.name: host
fields.label: Host
fields.description: The hostname or IP address of your SAP HANA server

fields.name: port
fields.label: Port
fields.description: The SQL port for your SAP HANA instance (typically 39015 for single-container or 3XX15 for multi-tenant)

fields.name: user
fields.label: Username
fields.description: SAP HANA user with SELECT privileges on the target schema

fields.name: password
fields.label: Password
fields.description: Password for the SAP HANA user

fields.name: schema
fields.label: Schema
fields.description: The SAP HANA schema containing the tables you want to sync
